title: Orthotists and Prosthetists
description: Design, measure, fit, and adapt orthopedic braces, appliances or prostheses, such as limbs or facial parts for patients with disabling conditions.

tasks.text: Fit, test, and evaluate devices on patients, and make adjustments for proper fit, function, and comfort.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Instruct patients in the use and care of orthoses and prostheses.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Examine, interview, and measure patients to determine their appliance needs and to identify factors that could affect appliance fit.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select materials and components to be used, based on device design.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design orthopedic and prosthetic devices, based on physicians' prescriptions and examination and measurement of patients.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Repair, rebuild, and modify prosthetic and orthopedic appliances.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Construct and fabricate appliances, or supervise others constructing the appliances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Make and modify plaster casts of areas to be fitted with prostheses or orthoses to guide the device construction process.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Confer with physicians to formulate specifications and prescriptions for orthopedic or prosthetic devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Show and explain orthopedic and prosthetic appliances to healthcare workers.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train and supervise support staff, such as orthopedic and prosthetic assistants and technicians.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Update skills and knowledge by attending conferences and seminars.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research new ways to construct and use orthopedic and prosthetic devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Publish research findings or present them at conferences and seminars.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
